title: LATERN 24Pcs Christmas Treat Boxes, 15CM x 9CM Cardboard Candy Cookie Box Plaid Santa Elf Snowman Elk Gingerbread Xmas Gift Box with Handle for Holiday Thanksgiving Xmas Party (4 Patterns)
features: [High quality] Made of high quality cardboard, food grade and safe, thick and durable, not easy to deform and break, not easy to tear and fade, stong structure and high load-bearing capacity
[Christmas Style] Included 4 different Christmas patterns: Red Santa Claus, Green Santa Claus, Elk Bell and Snowman; Bright colors and clear patterns, will add a strong Christmas atmosphere
[Easy to use] The gift box is flat-packed, just fold the treat box along the creases, then buckle the top handles on both sides, easy to assemble; When not in use, can lay it flat for easy storage
[Size] Box: 15cm x 9cm, height: 13.5cm, can provide enough space for small gifts and snacks etc; Come with 24pcs Christmas boxes, sufficient quantity to meet Christmas gift wrapping needs

[Applicable] Perfect for packaging cookies, candies, desserts, snacks and other small gifts, suitable for Christmas gift packaging, Christmas decorations, weddings, Christmas trees, party gift decorations etc
description: LATERN 24Pcs 15CM x 9CM Cardboard Christmas Treat Boxes are perfect for packaging cookies, candies, desserts, snacks and other small gifts, suitable for Christmas gift packaging, Christmas decorations, weddings, Christmas trees, party gift decorations etc! Feature: - Made of high quality cardboard, food grade and safe, thick and durable, not easy to deform and break, not easy to tear and fade. - Included 4 different Christmas patterns, bright colors and clear patterns, will add a strong Christmas atmosphere. - The gift box is flat-packed, just fold the treat box along the creases, then buckle the top handles on both sides, easy to assemble. - Can provide enough space for small gifts and snacks etc; Sufficient quantity to meet Christmas gift wrapping needs. Specification: Material: Cardboard Box: 15cm x 9cm Height: 13.5cm Color: Red, Green, Brown, White Pattern: Santa Claus, Elk Bell and Snowman Package included: 24 x Christmas Treat Boxes
